name: Matsi kai tsaye don Kula da Hemorrhage
description: Ikon zubar da jini na farko don samun damar iyawa da raunin jiki.
steps: Bayyana raunin ta hanyar yanke tufafi.
Aiwatar da rigar rauni ko rigar da aka naɗe ta kai tsaye akan raunin.
Danna sosai tare da diddigin hannunka. Yi amfani da nauyin jikin ku -- ba kawai ƙarfin hannu ba.
Riƙe ci gaba, matsa lamba mara yankewa na akalla mintuna 3.
KAR KA ɗaga rigar don dubawa - wannan yana kawo cikas ga samuwar jini.
Idan jini ya ratsa, ƙara wani sutura a sama. Kar a cire na farko.
Aminta da bandeji na matsa lamba idan akwai kuma matsa zuwa wurin tattara raunuka ko yawon shakatawa idan zubar jini ya ci gaba.
warnings: Matsakaicin kai tsaye kadai bai isa ba don zubar da jini -- ya ƙaru zuwa tattara raunuka ko yawon shakatawa.
Raunin haɗin gwiwa (kwakwalwa, axilla, wuyansa) yana buƙatar ɗaukar rauni, ba matsi na waje kaɗai ba.

pediatric.note: Matsakaicin daidaito kawai. Guji damfara thorax a jarirai.

obstetric.note: Guji matsi mai nauyi akan mahaifa. Yi amfani da marufi na gefe idan raunin haɗin gwiwa kusa da ƙashin ƙugu.
